subject: fix(content): rewrite audience and use cases for all 12 projects
body:
Previous use cases were feature lists disguised as bullet points
("Build multi-page forms with drag-and-drop editor"). Rewrote all
12 as real-world scenarios showing how a specific person uses the
app to solve a specific problem.

Audience descriptions now derive from who would have those problems
rather than listing generic user categories.

Tags: content, ux, copywriting
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: content-quality
Semver: patch
